flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Franklin and Marshall College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($34.4k → $40.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Franklin and Marshall College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1k → 1.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Franklin and Marshall College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($63.4k → $70.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Franklin and Marshall College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
